falsification_conditions.condition: The S&P 500 closes above 5,200 (a 5% move from current levels) within 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A clear breakout would invalidate the 'HOLD' signal by demonstrating sustained upward momentum contrary to the blowoff pattern expectation

falsification_conditions.condition: The 10-year Treasury yield rises above 4.8% and holds for 3 consecutive trading days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: This would indicate strong risk-on sentiment and inflationary pressures, contradicting the bearish blowoff pattern assumptions

falsification_conditions.condition: The CBOE VIX index drops below 15 and remains there for 7 consecutive days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: Such low volatility would refute the blowoff pattern's implied market stress, showing instead a calm environment inconsistent with the current verdict

doctrine: If you can't list what would prove your call wrong, you don't have a real call.
